message:
fcp-mesh: expand test-module imports for new gossip-signature test support

Add `EpochId` and `TailscaleNodeId` to the `fcp_core` import line in
the `fcp-mesh/src/node.rs` `mod tests` block so follow-up tests (the
ones exercising the just-added gossip-summary / revocation-push
signature verification paths) have the types they need in scope.

Import-only change; no production code touched in this commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
